name: Gary Peters
subject: we're currently being outraised
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
Despite unprecedented support for our campaign in Michigan, my opponent just announced he has broken fundraising records and outraised us for the second straight reporting period.

---
| |
---
Friend, this is bad: Despite unprecedented support for our campaign in Michigan, my opponent just announced he has broken fundraising records and outraised us for the second straight reporting period. This is all thanks to Donald Trump funneling MILLIONS into Michigan to defeat me and buy this seat to expand Mitch McConnell's majority in the Senate.

**They know that Democrats have ZERO chance of taking back the Senate if we lose in Michigan. And now, a recent poll shows me statistically tied with my right-wing opponent.**

Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports that Democrats can take back the Senate, but we must first win in Michigan. That's why my team set a rapid-response goal of raising $20,000 by midnight - but right now, we're falling $5,100 short, and we're running out of time.

**Friend, in a race this close - and with just hours left until midnight - whether or not we hit this goal could determine Senate control, so I'm counting on your immediate contribution:**

**[Will you rush $3 right now- every dollar you can before midnight - to help us win in Michigan, take back the Senate for Democrats and protect the future of the Supreme Court?](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da94b/5721a3ed/7058cb3e/efb4a25/2177400347/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsyNDMtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk243-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**

name: Bennet HQ
subject: evening news update (some good, some bad)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |

| Hi Team -

We've got some evening news for you:

THE GOOD: After we announced earlier that our momentum was slowing down, donors from Cresco really picked up the pace!

THE BAD: We're still $5,879 behind our daily goal! [If we don't hit this goal by midnight tonight, we won't be on track to hit our $700,000 goal by next Thursday!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba865/134673f2/8c72b10/6997625c/872381802/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_010720_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Polling shows that up to 67% of voters in New Hampshire are still undecided, with just over a month until primary day.

[Michael needs your help to keep our ads on air to reach these undecided voters until the first vote is cast.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba865/134673f2/8c72b10/6997625c/872381802/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_010720_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Will=20Douglas?=
subject: Here's why I'm running for Texas House
body:
Every Texan deserves opportunity. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/647bbcdea726/im-running-for-texas-house-12057793?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=96224680fc&e=4f010155df)
---
| | Peter,

I want to share with you why I decided to run for Texas House.

I grew up in a blue-collar family that lived in a mobile home in a rural community. I paid my way through school, and worked hard to manage and now own a small business. These are the values Texans across the state stand by.

But Democrats are threatening the state with big government and liberal values that could close off that dream for the next generation, and I can't sit by and let that happen.

It's why I'm challenging liberal Rhetta Bowers, who is one of the most left-wing legislators in the House. She has shown time and time again that she will wreck the Texas miracle that has let folks like me and so many others succeed.

[**But **](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=bc4b3abfbe&e=4f010155df)**[I'm confident that together, we can win this race.](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=50e256e51b&e=4f010155df)**

The voters of House District 113 are hard-working Texans, seeking their piece of the American Dream. My whole life, I’ve been after the same thing.

[**Please consider donating to our campaign to take back HD 113. Every little bit of support counts.**](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=e1eaa58366&e=4f010155df)

Together, we'll flip HD 113 red and keep Texas a beacon of liberty and prosperity.

For Texas,
[](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=7176b15818&e=4f010155df)
Will Douglas
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: Taxpayer-funded abortions
body:
Kendra Horn wants to use your tax dollars to fund abortions, we have to stop her. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/360de48a75ac/calling-all-patriots-12047093?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=4a8869311d&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=7cc2b4c1bc&e=795c6d9796 "DONATE NOW")
---
| Peter, Every day I feel like the luckiest grandma in the world. I have two sons and get to be "Mimi" to four adorable grandchildren, with a fifth on the way. Imagining anything happening to them is more than I can bear.

Which is why it is so enraging to hear Democrats fight for a so-called "right" to abortion. Killing the unborn isn't a right, it is an abomination, and Oklahomans know that.

I've always believed that we must protect all innocent life, including unborn babies. Life begins at conception and any country that permits late-term abortions and infanticide is not just.

Kendra Horn on the other hand is fighting in Congress right now to use your tax dollars to fund abortions. That goes against less Washington--more Oklahoma, and it certainly goes against the right to life.

In Congress I will fight for every child’s right to reach their God-given potential. That's real Oklahoma values, not what Horn represents.

[**Will you help us in our campaign to oust Horn and send a pro-life conservative to D.C. to fight for Oklahoma values? $5, $10, $15, $25, or anything you can would help tremendously.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=cc029e15e5&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [STAND FOR LIFE](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=cff65219fc&e=795c6d9796 "STAND FOR LIFE")
---
| **National Journal said this is the nation's #1 battleground district.**

The Associated Press has called Oklahoma's 5th Congressional District "a seat both parties expect to work fiercely to win in 2020."

Decision Desk HQ said "OK-5 is guaranteed to be one of 2020's most bitterly fought House elections."

Oklahoma's 5th district is going to be ground zero for the fight to take back the House this year. [**That's why we need your help.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=b0a2692db3&e=795c6d9796)

[**Please contr ibute $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 to help us take back the House for conservatives and put a pro-lifer in Congress to fight for Oklahoma values.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=bfcf143ff1&e=795c6d9796)

Best,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=22eed62c39&e=795c6d9796) \--Janet Barresi
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=cafbafd696&e=795c6d9796 "DONATE NOW")
---

---

name: Charles Booker
subject: Scared, Mitch?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOOKER FOR KENTUCKY, LTD
body:
|
---
Mitch McConnell is scared, folks. The day I announced I was running against him, Mitch’s team launched a stream of attack ads. Take a look for yourself: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13690619/142569459/1047375942?refcode=cb2020108am-nd_button&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2ViOTYyZC0xZjMyLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HeX39whLDrakoFlK_C_Kwn1DSCTf-NtSWvU2pcQT2Lc=) He **should** be scared. We won’t beat the most unpopular senator in America by running away from him or trying to be like him. We’re going to hold him accountable. Make him answer for what he’s done to us — for profiting off our pain. For how he’s acted against Kentucky, and for his own interests. **_****_**[To stay on track, I need 37 people from your area to donate to my Mitch Gotta Go Fund by midnight tonight. | | | Friend, Tomorrow, Virginia's General Assembly will kick off the 2020 Legislative Session — and it's looking like another gun control debate is on the horizon. As someone who has spent most of their career defending human rights in countries under tyrannical rule,_it's simply not in my nature to stand by and watch the Radical Left disassemble the Second Amendment. _ _**With Your Support, We Can Stand Together Against Richmond's Gun Grab._Can I Count You On My Team?_**_ [_**< << Yes, Tina! I Will Pitch In Today! >>
<<< Yes, Tina! I Will Pitch In Today! >>
<<< Yes, Tina! I Will Pitch In Today! >>**_](https://tinaramirez.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhoijuy-udthdyhkil-i/) **As we all know, America's Founders were deliberate in laying out the framework of our Constitution — _and they understood the right to bear arms would be essential in the fight to preserve Liberty_.** In my opinion, the gun control debate was settled when the Founding Fathers wrote: _**"The Right Of The People To Keep And Bear Arms, Shall NOT Be Infringed.**__**"**_ Richmond may be attempting to force its radical gun-control measures on Virginia, but if we stand strong and refuse to compromise, _we WILL defeat the gun control agenda!_ Sincerely, Tina Ramirez
Candidate for Congress

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | Friend, Tomorrow, Virginia's General Assembly will kick off the 2020 Legislative Session — and it's looking like another gun control debate is on the horizon. As someone who has spent most of their career defending human rights in countries under tyrannical rule,it's simply not in my nature to stand by and watch the Radical Left disassemble the Second Amendment. With Your Support, We Can Stand Together Against Richmond's Gun Grab.Can I Count You On My Team? As we all know, America's Founders were deliberate in laying out the framework of our Constitution — and they understood the right to bear arms would be essential in the fight to preserve Liberty. In my opinion, the gun control debate was settled when the Founding Fathers wrote: "The Right Of The People To Keep And Bear Arms, Shall NOT Be Infringed." Richmond may be attempting to force its radical gun-control measures on Virginia, but if we stand strong and refuse to compromise, we WILL defeat the gun control agenda! Sincerely, Tina Ramirez Candidate for Congress VA-07 | | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TINA RAMIREZ, INC. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | | | |

What did you think? |

_" As long as I am President of the United States, Iran will never be allowed to have a nuclear weapon."_
\- President Donald J. Trump, January 8, 2020
Friend,

When President Trump took the Oath of Office, he swore to Keep America Safe by putting AMERICA FIRST, no matter what.

This morning, he addressed the Nation regarding the swift action he took to take out Qassem Soleimani and Iran's missile response to that last night. All is well! _There were no casualties and Iran has made the smart decision to stand down._

President Trump made it clear that should Iran strike any American citizen or target, the United States will be ready to quickly and fully strike back without hesitation.

Democrats and the Fake News media are failing to understand that this isn't about politics and this isn't a game. The Left is attacking the President for eliminating a dangerous world leader who repeatedly threatened our Nation. It's disgusting.

**Look at just a few examples of what the 2020 Democrats had to say about the President 's actions to Keep America Safe:**
Chuck Schumer: _" I plan to fight him tooth and nail on this."_
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez: _" This is a war crime... It makes [Trump] a monster."_
Bernie Sanders: _" I am proud to have opposed all of Trump's military budgets." _
Elizabeth Warren: _" Donald Trump is dangerous."_
They truly hate our country, but he doesn't care what they think, as long as America is _SAFE._

Now, he wants to hear from REAL Patriots like YOU who love our country.

That's why he needs your immediate input on his Presidential Address.
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Breaking News: Congress of Counties Agenda Announced!
body:
Just Announced -- the agenda for Congress of Counties is now available! |
---
| |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6b4ec7882e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **Breaking News:
Congress of Counties Agenda Just Released!**
---
| Dear Hoosier Republican,

Just announced -- the agenda for [Congress of Counties is now available](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d416d98623&e=1acd9bb3d6)! This two-day training and networking event is now just over three weeks away on January 31-February 1.

Congress of Counties will include breakout sessions with topics including:
* Making the Decision: Recruiting Candidates & Launching a Campaign
* Diversity: The Art of Thinking Independently Together
* Building Blocks of a Successful Campaign
* County Officer Training: The Roles & Responsibilities
* Campaign Finance
* Data Center: The Basics & How to Create Walkbooks & 50%+
* Understanding Social Media: Facebook, Twitter, Instagram & More
* And more!

[\--> Check out the full Congress of Counties agenda! <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c92897061d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
Beyond just the breakout sessions, we're excited to announce that this year Congress of Counties will include a fun reception on Friday night with Governor Eric Holcomb and Chairman Kyle Hupfer! We'll have hospitality suites, a networking lounge, and lots of opportunities to interact with your fellow Republicans at this special event.

**If you're a candidate, grassroots activist, party officer, volunteer _or are just looking to get more involved_ , Congress of Counties is the event for you. **

[Review the full agenda here and reserve your spot now!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=49bbef3fba&e=1acd9bb3d6)

Thanks,
-Indiana Republican Party
---

---

| Team - this campaign has been, and always will be, powered by grassroots supporters like you - but looking over our records, it looks like you haven't been able to make a contribution yet.

[In a moment, we're going to ask you to chip in for the first time, but first, we want to tell you how your contribution will be used:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba863/134673f2/8d8fa3f/69976231/3044504239/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_010820_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

subject: National Convention Delegate Filing Period Begins Today
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
Fellow Democrat,
Today begins the filing period for becoming a Delegate to the National Convention. Forms can be found on our website at www.wvdems.org or by [clicking this link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13706747/142715409/1286579405?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODdmMTg5ZC01OTMyLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qDWrt8PtX_QVucAqOPiVKPoHhOo7EQS7_GRvK0wNKmQ=&emci=44915560-5832-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=887f189d-5932-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=5094937). There you will find the forms for download, the most updated Delegte Selection Plan (still subject to change), and our Starter Kit. All of those documents include important steps and dates.
Once you download your forms they may be..
**EMAILED** : Convention2020@wvdemocrats.com

**MAILED: **
The West Virginia Democratic Party
PO Box 11926
Charleston, WV 25339

**DELIVERED BY HAND:**
231 Capital Street, Suite 107
Charleston, WV 25301

If you have any further questions or concerns please email Convention2020@wvdemocrats.com, or call HQ at 304-342-8121.

We look forward to hearing from you!

_Team WVDP_

Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www.wvdems.org). This communication is not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Public employees may disregard. Contributions are not tax-deductible.
West Virginia Democratic Party
PO Box 11926
Charleston , WV 25339
United States

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Despite court order, Wisconsin still wants to purge 200k voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, New year, same voter suppression tricks. Wisconsin's GOP-controlled legislature is trying to circumvent a court ruling staying a purge of more than 200,000 voters from the state registrations. In 2016, millions of Democrats stayed home or were intimidated from voting at all, and Donald Trump won Wisconsin by just 0.77%, Michigan by just 0.23% and Pennsylvania by just 0.72%. They're trying to make this happen again in 2020. That's why we need to know if your voting plans have changed: **As of today, do you plan to vote for Trump in 2020?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf2a/6e9863e8/17be643d/1db0448b/530131874/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/UA1RcPtuk") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf2a/6e9863e8/17be643d/1db0448b/530131874/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/UA1RcPtuk") Thank you for your response, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf2a/6e9863e8/17be643d/1db0448a/530131874/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20200108a.ND&refcode2=37fHix3OsOx3ivBjq0j0")

name: Mike Thompson
subject: I’m proud of the steps we’ve taken on gun violence, but our work isn’t done
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
Peter,

Today marks one year since my colleagues and I introduced the Bipartisan Background Checks Act of 2019, which would require a background check on all firearms sales.

Today also marks the ninth anniversary of the tragic shooting in Tucson, Arizona where 6 people were killed and 13 were wounded - including my friend Gabby Giffords.

I'm proud that this bill passed the House last February. Now, the Senate must take it up and pass it. [**Will you join me in calling on the Senate to pass this common sense gun reform right away?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/r-po91ZnFHvdR1P0OC8Z3tf6YBALIlS69PX1fhxSvQs=/Qd6iIIAvQYNst33Bbc_kYJ5R8LEZKYG3Xx3hRUpnxTY=)
******[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/r-po91ZnFHvdR1P0OC8Z3tf6YBALIlS69PX1fhxSvQs=/Qd6iIIAvQYNst33Bbc_kYJ5R8LEZKYG3Xx3hRUpnxTY=)****** Today is a day of remembrance for the community of Tucson, and for everyone who mourns when folks in our communities are harmed by gun violence. We must take decisive action to curb this uniquely American epidemic. [**Please sign now to call on the Senate to pass a background checks bill right away.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/r-po91ZnFHvdR1P0OC8Z3tf6YBALIlS69PX1fhxSvQs=/Qd6iIIAvQYNst33Bbc_kYJ5R8LEZKYG3Xx3hRUpnxTY=)

Thank you,

Mike

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump to Address the Nation on Iran Attacks
body:
President Donald J. Trump will speak on the Iran crisis at 11 a.m. this morning. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9b560c73d5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **President Trump to Address the Nation on Iran Attacks**

President Donald J. Trump will speak on the Iran crisis at 11 a.m. this morning, “after Iran attacked two military bases in Iraq that house American troops,” David Jackson reports for _USA Today_.

Last night, the President announced on Twitter that "All is well,” adding that "missiles launched from Iran at two military bases located in Iraq. Assessment of casualties & damages taking place now. So far, so good! We have the most powerful and well equipped military anywhere in the world, by far!"

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=68979924b7&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2020/01/08/donald-trump-address-nation-iran-attacks/2842056001/")

**Watch:** [**President Trump address the nation live at 11 a.m. ET**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0c964a8a5d&e=3ee4985eea "https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e9fe84f550&e=39c3ab7d07")
---
|
---
| While the Iranian regime portrays Qasem Soleimani as a hero, “ordinary Iranians and many others in the region know him as a murderous and brutal killer responsible for the deaths of hundreds of thousands in Iran and across the region.” In the wake of his death, “Iranians on social media have been thanking President Trump by posting photos and videos,” Raman Ghavami writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4ea106b895&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell made it official Tuesday: He’s calling House Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s bluff, and refusing to guarantee impeachment trial procedures of her choosing.” Speaker Pelosi’s stall tactics reveal “the blatant, politically driven contradiction between her rush to a House vote on impeachment and her subsequent delay of any Senate trial,” the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3f13ef3eea&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump delivered a keynote address yesterday at the annual Consumer Electronics Show in Las Vegas, touting innovation as an engine for American job growth, James Rogers and Stephanie Bennett report for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b8c60dee5b&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a602c5dbc6&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=90ce443abf&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=14e369829a)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

I put in the (paper)work, folks: **I officially filed to run for U.S. Senate this afternoon.** ******[Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13707918/142731420/870291931?refcode=cb2020108pm-nd_b&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmQwMjRkNy02MTMyLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y9qXPkjwbRc93B6tKkaPqMI6x-2xxUajeVc4thZ_TP4=)****** I made this run official in the State Capitol building, where I’m fighting tooth and nail for Kentuckians as a state representative. Filing in the same place where I’ve championed issues from voting rights to criminal justice reform to public education and labor laws felt symbolic of the change to come. This movement is about more than just a stack of paperwork, though. It’s about regular folks coming together to reclaim their power and make positive change. **_****_**[If you’re ready to show Mitch the door, will you make your first donation to the Mitch Gotta Go Fund?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13707919/142731421/870291931?refcode=cb2020108pm-nd_a1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmQwMjRkNy02MTMyLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y9qXPkjwbRc93B6tKkaPqMI6x-2xxUajeVc4thZ_TP4=)**_****_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **** | ******[Express Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13707920/142731422/870291931?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=cb2020108pm-AB-n

name: Rep. Joe Alexander
subject: Democrats infringed on your Second Amendment Rights yet again
body:
Dear Derek, I wish I could say I am surprised, but the NH House just passed another gun control bill. **This is hardly the New Hampshire Way.** Unfortunately the gun control movement is not confined to New Hampshire. Advocates of ‘extreme risk protection orders’ argue that 17 other states have already implemented a policy “to temporarily limit a person’s access to firearms.” They cite places like DC as models for New Hampshire gun control policy. Make no mistake, this is a national movement - and it must stop in NH. [Support NHGOP today by donating $20.20, $25, $50, 100, or another amount](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzI5MDcxODIxMzY1OTc0NTkwJmM9ZzNnMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMDc3Nzc5MTQmZD10NnE0Zzlq.upzDb99Xe2VXz1Tj7-S7mB61tHDl0fST9nPjZpc-wHw) as we combat these national gun grabbing groups run by billionaires Michael Bloomberg and Tom Steyer. The NHGOP is committed to countering the national money flowing into our State. [Support that effort today.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzI5MDcxODIxMzY1OTc0NTkwJmM9ZzNnMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMDc3Nzc5MTYmZD15OXYwajFm.etMC57FIyKgep44N73HVnu_vrDaGdx3fxv5rt4FFIgc) There is too much to lose as these national groups descend on NH. [Stand with us today.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzI5MDcxODIxMzY1OTc0NTkwJmM9ZzNnMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMDc3Nzc5MTgmZD10MGE2ejBp.bNb0Kq0q-dXNj_Ywi18QEnR1EGE_36Jwy-5q34Xbi3U) Rep Joe Alexander
NHGOP Finance Director _P.S. Did you see what Democrat Rep. Deb Stevens had to say about gun owners?[ Help us defeat these Democrats with an investment today.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzI5MDcxODIxMzY1OTc0NTkwJmM9ZzNnMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMDc3Nzc5MjAmZD1uMWE4bjdj.XeUid8rzioC-zvsTaLqMEygO9tnH7gA6IPrPaxLJ0ZU)_ [](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzI5MDcxODIxMzY1OTc0NTkwJmM9ZzNnMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMDc3Nzc5MjImZD1rNGI1cjRn.CLXAMezOTSLMg63zRPJnsjr-I-S28kRef_PJp_ZKOjk)

name: Kim Mangone
subject: women’s reproductive rights are human rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Committee to Elect Kim Mangone for Congress
body:
Peter -- I’m running on an unapologetically pro-women platform. So I was disgusted, but not surprised, when Kevin McCarthy signed on to a brief asking the Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade. Being pro-choice means trusting American women to do the right thing for their own bodies. But Kevin McCarthy wants to go back to a time when fear and secrecy ruled our country’s women’s health policy. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee. You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915 We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do! | |

| Exciting news!
**Concerned Women for America Legislative Action Committee (CWA) has officially endorsed my campaign for congress!**
CWA is the leading women's public policy organization in the country and is focused on bringing Biblical principles to our national political life.
Just as exciting, **CWA President and CEO Penny Young Nance** , a recognized national authority on cultural, children's, and women's issues, **has personally endorsed me.**
---

| |
My candidacy has also been endorsed by **Texas Right to Life!**

|
Many of you undoubtedly support this campaign because of **my unwavering support for the pro-life cause**. As your representative, defending and protecting life will be the highest and most sacred obligation.

name: Tom Steyer
subject: Australia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Australia continues to be in my heart, friend. Towers of flame are still burning as an entire continent has been forced into a dire emergency. Over 14 million acres of land have been torched, over a billion animals have been killed, volunteer firefighters are putting their lives at risk, and the smoke is even choking residents in New Zealand, thousands of miles away. Whether climate change deniers in power accept it or not, these disasters will not solve themselves. They will spiral out beyond our imagination. This is not the first time our global community has been ravaged by the climate crisis, and these disasters will continue to scale up to uncontrollable proportions. We must act now to fix this crisis and make it a top priority. **Here are just a few organizations providing relief to Australia and those affected. Please consider donating what you can today.**
* [_**Australian Red Cross**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBuiKM5iq9F4NNcl7rFVx5-2FEpCH0TaAU-2FzlfD3tYbB0QHvbKdkykCja4bkyaZ8Y9UPZXVwL31wErgyi3ZQfnjjsLTZAZa3uT3O3g0yJEZKJxC_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCEfMDVgenuIpuaqOZjDID1RvhNGhYRMastDcDetuZ96NLKCKhV4yPx4QHCZUAm-2BunqurTNJqOIYfGmKY6Mq8ex0e4ofS0yXRiQbiNqvjGpXczqp6Ucgt0ky8bSHHHm-2FlbdwkhKoc1CSPtutjJno1ytTaRV6YhDZ-2Bpo4in4g4u4Aj-2FyanZqeu-2BOQGf8pNiKfpHAFX6gPKIhw-2Bt9SyWKq3c0M3QbzBpzZZmK6szGEtXRBCbxAge4ktI-2B2klVbe6YO4pLvuqyK-2FRds1tWhV7IDliOkjocdKVKhQ3hi9SmQpZ6cP-2Fu-2Bm2weQBzgxV-2FgoWET1-2BVjYC5TOoiO1bxaR4Ak36Euip7RqyfkGGyPfAHng55x40onsONEIUjUbHWmK-2FdSisJRNzayLNpizhbIIlJ296POzDiQS5GKczJnDqJRHbwrCqV2Y8YO6xOZiTjr-2F-2BQfsyx-2B7NRonScm91zFjsCe2Ur-2FVClN5h2WlheOxvPxhkRoE9w4iFQur0d1hyaOw-2BUNBeo-3D)

clean_body: | | | | Australia continues to be in my heart, friend. Towers of flame are still burning as an entire continent has been forced into a dire emergency. Over 14 million acres of land have been torched, over a billion animals have been killed, volunteer firefighters are putting their lives at risk, and the smoke is even choking residents in New Zealand, thousands of miles away. Whether climate change deniers in power accept it or not, these disasters will not solve themselves. They will spiral out beyond our imagination. This is not the first time our global community has been ravaged by the climate crisis, and these disasters will continue to scale up to uncontrollable proportions. We must act now to fix this crisis and make it a top priority. Here are just a few organizations providing relief to Australia and those affected. Please consider donating what you can today. ** Our home is on fire, and we must band together to help. —Tom | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " | "Instagram " ---|---|--- | Thank you for being a part of this campaign! We want to make sure you're receiving relevant information about how you can help us do what's right. If you'd like to learn more about volunteering, . If you want to be a delegate for Tom at the DNC convention in Milwaukee next July, . To update your contact information, . If you’d rather not receive any emails from us, you can unsubscribe by clicking — we’ll be sad to see you go! name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: President Trump just made clear that America will no longer appease terrorists.
body:
His clear principles are a model for a strong foreign policy. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/519348503ccf/calling-all-patriots-12121069?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=c23082f6e3&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=ff3c5f281c&e=795c6d9796)
---
| Peter,

In his remarks this morning, President Trump showed that he is standing on bedrock principles.

#1 Iran will never have a nuclear weapon.

#2 The strength of the United States military is unparalleled and is prepared to defend our citizens in our homeland and abroad at any time.

#3 The strength of our economy and our energy independence are allowing us to fight back whenever and wherever we are opposed by those that wish us harm. We are fighting on our terms.

#4 We will always seek peace but will do so from a position of strength and not appeasement.

So for Kendra Horn and the liberal socialist Democrats who allege that the president is erratic in his approach to foreign-policy, you have just heard his response.

I am focused more than ever in showing my support for President Trump by beating Kendra Horn in November.

But we need your help in order to get over the finish line. Will you consider helping our campaign? Here are a few simple things you can do:
* Follow us on [**Facebook**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=f334ca57f0&e=795c6d9796) and [**Twitter**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=c67d9856dc&e=795c6d9796)
* [**Donate just $5**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=9ebd6e4a5e&e=795c6d9796) to our campaign.
* [**Sign up to volunteer**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=42d964e866&e=795c6d9796) (there's lots of easy ways to get involved)

Thank you for all your help. Please pray for our nation, President Trump, and our armed forces during this challenging time on the world stage.

For Freedom,

[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=6850802fab&e=795c6d9796) Janet Barresi
---

| Peter,
In case you missed it, today was a big day for the campaign. First, [we launched our new ad](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ecsHg5izyyXXqyQJCp3ZNJdZtyNw_Sh8Ixpy9j9c7XHO9aNp86FcYWR8lyFpnJGXvBmkVHnMKW_cbiBGKEDjZdbBpcZifOqmiAa7B6RJQnytPl3uRbsUxZ0ED6X23WkFWIcndYHv7TkYZeEhB1RCLw==&c=0hP4-kNL7FdYHzspZsIgFyfwnBnEx47xpSq0R9KXlKNqQ5lvG86ILw==&ch=UhIxyTCtm2FmEx-EcpKDkOueef-4xiz9sg1UdkpYudyY6MngExV27A==) that will be showing across the district. If you haven't seen it yet, you can check it out below.

| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ecsHg5izyyXXqyQJCp3ZNJdZtyNw_Sh8Ixpy9j9c7XHO9aNp86FcYWR8lyFpnJGXvBmkVHnMKW_cbiBGKEDjZdbBpcZifOqmiAa7B6RJQnytPl3uRbsUxZ0ED6X23WkFWIcndYHv7TkYZeEhB1RCLw==&c=0hP4-kNL7FdYHzspZsIgFyfwnBnEx47xpSq0R9KXlKNqQ5lvG86ILw==&ch=UhIxyTCtm2FmEx-EcpKDkOueef-4xiz9sg1UdkpYudyY6MngExV27A==)
---
| We also received [an awesome writeup](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ecsHg5izyyXXqyQJCp3ZNJdZtyNw_Sh8Ixpy9j9c7XHO9aNp86FcYWR8lyFpnJGXeM_dq1xgB2DtU23ldaZnbe9xHWxAPCU7H_SgteCipdI8GBbX3eIXDrtTCRuq9-vu8FAbNvjqjAxEyn7gMGafOoR0TOPjOfoQBNGSWYGVbAk4fldaR2WjKDyW_7WUTHUjjUH6zRJem9Lvf-_wJS04lRJ9xSJ_8jV1C2ChBYp5ILNLvXPKtLuKy16r92IAZHsZho1_KCvLcB17kFFcctycgIdQtslPf2Auy918AzZ6wX1EH9PWYR0FQLTeCDtc7xlG&c=0hP4-kNL7FdYHzspZsIgFyfwnBnEx47xpSq0R9KXlKNqQ5lvG86ILw==&ch=UhIxyTCtm2FmEx-EcpKDkOueef-4xiz9sg1UdkpYudyY6MngExV27A==) about our campaign, courtesy of Townhall. Here's just a taste of what they had to say: "Collins is a phenomenal choice to represent the GOP and take the seat back."
---
| Finally, we also announced our campaign headquarters grand opening event, to be held on Thursday, January 16th. You can [click/tap here to RSVP to our Facebook event](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ecsHg5izyyXXqyQJCp3ZNJdZtyNw_Sh8Ixpy9j9c7XHO9aNp86FcYWR8lyFpnJGXPqSUcoe4c-kyDH1bsKjwdSnCbFvAcFZcTnRhD2Lu7zmvpiqQrW1HyrlDUKzamAJUiDS0LQDiU98tnojPxN-PIyUexhDj0-3bW_YXHJn49pUFV5wpPUcY9A==&c=0hP4-kNL7FdYHzspZsIgFyfwnBnEx47xpSq0R9KXlKNqQ5lvG86ILw==&ch=UhIxyTCtm2FmEx-EcpKDkOueef-4xiz9sg1UdkpYudyY6MngExV27A==), or reply to this email to RSVP.
So as you can tell, today was a big day for us with a lot of momentum going our way. If you'd like to get involved and help our winning team, you can [follow this link to volunteer](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ecsHg5izyyXXqyQJCp3ZNJdZtyNw_Sh8Ixpy9j9c7XHO9aNp86FcYdR-NMsPaKwSkIFCaalSr2IdK2YoxLPtJRUl7cO6cHH7au433eMhQQGKvYUTF3mfjXqChH4_GbGOwzFqdpGUhId4H9t0WxlAOhRxxWPzuusOXCY9T8wV9so=&c=0hP4-kNL7FdYHzspZsIgFyfwnBnEx47xpSq0R9KXlKNqQ5lvG86ILw==&ch=UhIxyTCtm2FmEx-EcpKDkOueef-4xiz9sg1UdkpYudyY6MngExV27A==).
Thank you and God bless,
---
|

| Genevieve

name: John Hickenlooper 2020
subject: Will you make your first donation of 2020?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
This is going to be one of the most expensive races in the country, folks. We've already heard Republicans like Mitch McConnell and Chris Christie are planning to spend big in Colorado and across the country. **But it 's about to get worse -- because a new analysis of our race just reported that they expect more than $100 million to be spent on TV and digital ads in this Senate race.** Here's why: Republicans know Colorado is the single-best chance Democrats have of flipping a seat -- and we're in the lead right now. So, Trump and McConnell are going to spend, say, and do whatever it takes to attack John and tear down our campaign before it begins. We cannot let them get away with buying another Senate seat. [**We need to be ready to fight back, so I 'm asking you personally to make your first 2020 contribution of $10 or more to help us build a winning campaign here in Colorado that will flip this seat and take back the Senate for Democrats.**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200107-tv?refcode=em-200107-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") | [DONATE](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200107-tv?refcode=em-200107-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
We can win this race because Coloradans are fed up with having a Senator who only works for Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell's best interests instead of the interests of everyday folks. Even major election forecasters say this race is a "toss-up" because Coloradans are ready for change, and you bet we're willing to fight for it.
With enough grassroots momentum, we can win in November. But that means we can't afford to slow down -- not when the GOP is looking for any opportunity to attack us and tilt the balance of this election in their favor.
[**Will you make your first donation of 2020 to our campaign for U.S. Senate here in Colorado? name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Donald Trump is the most corrupt president in the history of the United States
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Last night, I had the chance to talk to Rachel Maddow about the problems that our country is facing and the grassroots movement we're building to fight for big, structural change... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b97d/45c30650/1e9477d06/66fcf886/3807608560/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
The other night, I had the chance to talk to Rachel Maddow about the problems that our country is facing and the grassroots movement we're building to fight for big, structural change.

**Let's be clear: Donald Trump is the most corrupt president in the history of the United States.**

He campaigned on corruption, and then in office, he turned around on all of his promises. He's enabled the wealthiest Americans to grow their fortunes while cutting essential services for working families. He's not just representative of corruption in Washington, he's its logical conclusion.

But here's how I see it: 2020 is our chance. Our chance to vote out the most corrupt administration in history and elect a president that puts working people first.

**Together, we can stop Donald Trump -- and we can root out the decades of corruption that have led us to this moment. But I can't do it without the help of strong grassroots supporters like you.**

[**Can you chip in for the first time today to help build our grassroots movement and fight for big, structural change?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b97d/45c30650/1e9477d06/66fcf889/3807608560/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjI3Rl9FR1JfQ09SX0VfMjAyMDAxMDhfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN27F_EGR_COR_E_20200108_V1S3_P") | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
I have three brothers, all back in Oklahoma. Two of them are Republicans, and one of them is a Democrat. They don't always see eye to eye, but there's one thing that unites them: **corruption.**

They're furious that the wealthy and well-connected own an ever-greater share of wealth and power in America, while more and more working families are reaching the breaking point.

Because the truth is our government isn't holding the rich and powerful to account. They know it, and we know it -- and unless we put up a fight, nothing will change.

This campaign is our chance to change that. This is our chance to dream bigger, to put power in the hands of working people, to root out the corruption in Washington that has blocked progress for decades, and to build a government and an economy that works for everyone.

I don't host any private events to raise money from wealthy donors behind closed doors. And I don't take any money from Washington lobbyists or PACs. I only count on contributions and support from our strongest grassroots supporters. And any contribution you can make will make a powerfully important difference today.

[**Can you chip in today to help power this campaign? With you in this fight, we'll be able to create real accountability in Washington come 2021.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b97d/45c30650/1e9477d06/66fcf889/3807608560/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjI3Rl9FR1JfQ09SX0VfMjAyMDAxMDhfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN27F_EGR_COR_E_20200108_V1S3_P")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth Warren

name: James Mackler
subject: Say no to a war with Iran
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1e1/18d6a294/4cdc07af/26d636a2/3128162019/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | There have not been any causality reports regarding Iran's missile attacks on two airbases in Iraq, and I continue to hope nobody was lost. Iran firing missiles themselves, rather than leaning on their more standard tactic of directing a proxy force to do their bidding, ratchets up what was already a serious national security crisis well beyond anyone's comfort level. While no American should mourn the passing of Soleimani, questioning the wisdom of conducting the drone strike is a valid and patriotic thing to do at this moment. The president has said without elaborating that Soleimani was planning "a very big attack and a very bad attack for us." Under normal circumstances, this type of justification may have been enough. But that's not where we're at today with an administration that conducts foreign policy by tweet, abandons our allies while cozying up to dictators, drives out top military and diplomatic personnel protesting a host of questionably motivated policy decisions, and misleads the American people on a daily basis. The public characterizations of the intelligence behind his claim haven't inspired confidence and the president further undermines his own case with bombastic statements such as "I don't need exit strategies." Last week after reports emerged of Soleimani's death, Vice President Pence falsely tweeted about coordination between the 9/11 terrorist attackers and Soleimani, leading some to speculate he did so in order for this administration to apply the 2001 Authorization of Military Force (AUMF) to any military response without further consultation from Congress. For eighteen years, our presidents have used the 2001 AUMF, signed by President Bush in wake of 9/11, to fight terrorism without further congressional debate, even as the conflict has evolved and changed. I've called on Congress to debate, and vote on, a new AUMF for our war against ISIS. Neither the 2001 AUMF, nor an updated one, should apply to a war with Iran, and I applaud U.S. Senator Tim Kaine for standing up to demand a vote on military action with Iran and reasserting the Senate's Constitutional role in decisions about war. It's worth noting that Senator Kaine made the same non-partisan case when President Obama expanded military operations against ISIS to Syria. Any decision to go to war should be made carefully and with deep consideration, and authorization to use force must be carefully crafted to address today's threats and operational environment. My likely opponent for the open U.S. Senate seat in Tennessee is former Ambassador Bill Hagerty, who is proud to have his campaign tweet-launched by the president and promises at every opportunity to be a blank check for this administration should he become a senator. Tennesseans will have a clear choice in November between a blank check and a combat veteran who joined the U.S. Army to serve after we were attacked on 9/11. I earned an age waiver to go to flight school, learned how to fly a Black Hawk helicopter, and I did that in Iraq. I've been to war and seen the impact that multiple deployments have on troops and military families. **Patriotism in America has never been defined as blind obedience to authority. There are and will be times when war is necessary, and our Constitution requires those decisions be made with Congress and the American people. I 'm running for U.S. Senate to stand up for what's right and stand up to any president when they're wrong.** [_**Join me and say no to a war with Iran.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1e1/18d6a294/4cdc07af/26d636a3/3128162019/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/landing/e200107/") Thank you, James
---

|
---
| | Paid for by James Mackler for U.S. Senate
---
James Mackler is a member of the Tennessee National Guard and a former member of the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Tennessee National Guard, the Department of the Army, or the Department of Defense. name: SaraGideon.com
subject: Susan Collins is helping Mitch McConnell prevent witnesses from testifying in the Senate's impeachment trial. Fight back with a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon's campaign right away.
body:
Thanks to Susan Collins, McConnell now has the votes to block a fair impeachment trial that includes witnesses.
[**Fight back with a donation to Sara Gideon's campaign to defeat Susan Collins.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e5c/4bef7a87/6af83fd2/287f9989/1205345869/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMDgtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200108-1-full")

* * *

******BREAKING : Collins backs McConnell's plans on impeachment******
Friends -
Susan Collins just announced that she is backing Mitch McConnell on the impeachment process, giving him the votes he needs to block a fair impeachment trial that includes witnesses.
We're not surprised - Collins has proven again and again that she is just another reliable vote for Republicans and Trump in the Senate. It's time to replace her with someone who will stand up for what's right:
****[**Rush a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon 's campaign if you want a Senator who will stand up to McConnell and demand a fair trial.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e5c/4bef7a87/6af83fd2/287f9989/1205345869/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMDgtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200108-1-full")****

name: MJ Hegar Headquarters
subject: We built something big, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907ab/7f51f7bc/4ad5b0a4/4ef025f1/3662003980/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter --

In 2019, we built something big -- and we couldn't have done it **[without you](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907ab/7f51f7bc/4ad5b0a4/4ef025f7/3662003980/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200108.1nd__726__&amount=10")**.

**What we 've done:**
* Texas is a big state, and we built the foundation for a campaign to match. MJ has driven more than 11,000 miles to talk to voters. From labor halls to health care clinics to people's living rooms, from the Rio Grande Valley to West Texas, MJ's heard from more than 10,000 Texans.
* **More than 25,000 individuals** have chipped in to join this team and invest in a better future for Texas -- because they believe we _can_ improve our health care system, address the threat of climate change, and achieve common-sense gun reform. As a true grassroots movement, we're relying on people like you, _not_ corporate PACs. That's why nine out of ten donations to our campaign are less than $100, and our average online gift is $21.

**[Will you make a donation to keep building this campaign?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907ab/7f51f7bc/4ad5b0a4/4ef025f7/3662003980/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200108.1nd__726__&amount=10")** **What 's next:**
* Now, we have to let undecided voters across Texas know that **MJ is the best candidate to defeat Sen. Cornyn** and represent them in the Senate -- because she's a combat veteran and a working mom who's never backed down from a tough fight. **[Donate to help MJ win the Texas Democratic primary and take on Sen. Cornyn>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907ab/7f51f7bc/4ad5b0a4/4ef025f7/3662003980/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200108.1nd__726__&amount=10")**
* To accomplish that, we'll spread MJ's message far and wide to show folks how MJ will fight for them in all the ways that Sen. Cornyn hasn't in his nearly two decades in office -- **and win this election.**

**So cons.firstname -- are you in? It 's officially election year, and we need you now to keep building the campaign that will beat Sen. Cornyn and his $11 million war chest.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Greg Stanton
subject: DREAMers represent everything that is right about Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
**As of March 2017, there were over 51,000 Arizonans who were DACA-recipients. **

These DREAMers represent everything that is right about Arizona -- they are our friendly neighbors, our fellow students, our innovative workers, and some of our most civic-minded residents.

But sadly, the Trump Administration wants to continue using these DREAMers as pawns in their political games to get a Border Wall built.

[**Add your name to tell Congress to take urgent action to protect DREAMers -- _SIGN ON »_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/tRjIDsWE88lLOr-ntsi-ZrMGcMlseIjOsSMjAQp8AeY=/qFzwacCkMBHE-r1mLaOHH5iZFCRoO6D5pq6LwlvKfFk=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/tRjIDsWE88lLOr-ntsi-ZrMGcMlseIjOsSMjAQp8AeY=/qFzwacCkMBHE-r1mLaOHH5iZFCRoO6D5pq6LwlvKfFk=)

Look, for many DREAMers, the United States is the only home they've ever known.

**We cannot let partisan politicking get in the way of keeping these important members of our community here in the United States.**

[**Will you join me in calling on Congress to pass legislation to protect DREAMers?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/tRjIDsWE88lLOr-ntsi-ZrMGcMlseIjOsSMjAQp8AeY=/qFzwacCkMBHE-r1mLaOHH5iZFCRoO6D5pq6LwlvKfFk=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/tRjIDsWE88lLOr-ntsi-ZrMGcMlseIjOsSMjAQp8AeY=/qFzwacCkMBHE-r1mLaOHH5iZFCRoO6D5pq6LwlvKfFk=)

Thank you for taking action,

\-- _ Greg_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress
---
Stanton for Congress
4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: The GOP is attacking women's rights in 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Republicans have lost no time in attacking women's rights in the new year. 205 GOP members of Congress submitted a letter to the Supreme Court asking them to undo _Roe v. Wade_ and destroy the right to choose and bodily autonomy. In March, the Court will be hearing the Louisiana abortion case that this amicus curae brief references \-- meaning they could undo Roe v. Wade and legal abortion in the U.S. before the 2020 election. The Supreme Court, led by Trump's hand-picked, anti-choice justices Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh, as already been taking steps toward dismantling these rights, rejecting a challenge to a Kentucky law requiring doctors to perform ultrasounds and play a fetal heartbeat to those seeking abortions. [**If you agree that we need to preserve access to abortion and stop Trump and the GOP 's campaign against women's rights, add your name to ours and demand the Supreme Court protect them! **](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf2b/6e9863e8/17b843e1/1db0448f/3809085804/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://www.paction.us/scotus-protect-womens-rights/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf2b/6e9863e8/17b843e1/1db0448f/3809085804/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://www.paction.us/scotus-protect-womens-rights/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

name: Rick Kennedy
subject: Confrontation with Iran
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13712332/142789820/-1907457918?refcode=01082020_em_hdr&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjAwNjE1OS03ZjMyLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N9R_WQusnrmR2691k17NKSz8v3xAWEEh8PlPt5LdVZQ=)
---
Dear Friend, I want to keep my campaign focused on our core issues of health care, immigration, and rural revitalization. However, international events sometimes demand attention. Our confrontation with Iran is one of those times. It appears that Iran has delivered a measured response to the killing of Qassim Suleimani, a response designed to satisfy domestic political needs while providing a de-escalation path to both sides. I sincerely hope both sides take that path. The Constitution vests the power to declare war in Congress, not the executive branch. In recent decades however, Congress has ceded this, and many other Constitutional responsibilities to the White House. We must re-establish Congress as an equal branch of government dedicated to working for the American people. To do so, we must elect representatives who will put the people ahead of their party and will put sound governance ahead of political theatrics. It's time to vote out the ideologues and the opportunists and elect representatives who will work for you. And this is my pledge - as your Congressman my loyalty will be to the country, the Constitution, and you my constituents, not PACs, parties, or presidents. I need your help to get there. **[Click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13712333/142789821/-1907457918?refcode=01082020_em_l1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjAwNjE1OS03ZjMyLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N9R_WQusnrmR2691k17NKSz8v3xAWEEh8PlPt5LdVZQ=)** or one of the buttons below to chip in what you can, and we'll make it happen together. _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | **[$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13712334/142789822/1282640063?refcode=01082020_em_abx1&amount=10&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjAwNjE1OS03ZjMyLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N9R_WQusnrmR2691k17NKSz8v3xAWEEh8PlPt5LdVZQ=)** | **[$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13712335/142789823/1282640063?refcode=01082020_em_abx2&amount=25&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjAwNjE1OS03ZjMyLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N9R_WQusnrmR2691k17NKSz8v3xAWEEh8PlPt5LdVZQ=)** | **[$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13712336/142789824/1282640063?refcode=01082020_em_abx3&amount=50&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjAwNjE1OS03ZjMyLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N9R_WQusnrmR2691k17NKSz8v3xAWEEh8PlPt5LdVZQ=)**

clean_body: | = Dear Friend, I want to keep my campaign focused on our core issues of health care, immigration, and rural revitalization. However, international events sometimes demand attention. Our confrontation with Iran is one of those times. It appears that Iran has delivered a measured response to the killing of Qassim Suleimani, a response designed to satisfy domestic political needs while providing a de-escalation path to both sides. I sincerely hope both sides take that path. The Constitution vests the power to declare war in Congress, not the executive branch. In recent decades however, Congress has ceded this, and many other Constitutional responsibilities to the White House. We must re-establish Congress as an equal branch of government dedicated to working for the American people. To do so, we must elect representatives who will put the people ahead of their party and will put sound governance ahead of political theatrics. It's time to vote out the ideologues and the opportunists and elect representatives who will work for you. And this is my pledge - as your Congressman my loyalty will be to the country, the Constitution, and you my constituents, not PACs, parties, or presidents. I need your help to get there. = or one of the buttons below to chip in what you can, and we'll make it happen together. If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you, Rick | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

name: U.S. Senator Ed Markey
subject: Add your name to condemn Trump's threats against Iran
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
Over the weekend, Donald Trump tweeted threats of retaliation if Iran were to strike the United States.
# [](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df8c/693b8b0a/4375fc3e/72de7290/3759611068/VEsH/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
Last night, Iran attacked air bases in Iraq that house U.S. troops and personnel. Fortunately, no lives were lost, but Donald Trump must take responsibility for the lives of our servicemembers, civilians, and allies that were put in danger with his dangerous escalation of conflict with Iran.
Over the weekend, Donald Trump tweeted threats of retaliation if Iran were to strike the United States.
He said that his administration has targeted 52 sites, including cultural sites, that he would hit should such an attack take place.
**Let me be very clear here: Attacking cultural sites is a war crime, and the Trump administration knows it.**
Imagine if the Statue of Liberty were attacked. Or the Tao Pueblo in New Mexico. Or the memorials along the National Mall. That's why destroying cultural sites is a violation of international law.
The United States Senate must act to prevent any further escalation and block Donald Trump from launching unlawful military actions. We are dangerously close to going to war with Iran when we should instead be working to put a stop to the endless wars in the Middle East.
Today, I introduced a resolution condemning Trump's threats to target cultural sites, and I need you to stand with me on this issue.
**[Add your name now to support my resolution condemning Donald Trump's threats against Iran. We cannot allow him to commit war crimes.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df8c/693b8b0a/4375fc3e/72de7297/3759611068/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMDgtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/iran-resolution?source=em200108-full")**
His actions over the past week have made our country less safe. We cannot allow his threats to go unchallenged.
Thank you for standing with me in this fight.
\- Ed
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df8c/693b8b0a/4375fc3e/72de7297/3759611068/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMDgtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/iran-resolution?source=em200108-full")**

* * *
Paid for by The Markey Committee

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Senator Ed Markey with a contribution, [click here](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df8c/693b8b0a/4375fc3e/72de7295/3759611068/VEsD/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_footer").

I'm appalled and disgusted by any attempt to scale back the protections this law has given so many people -- **the ACA literally saves lives.**
My Republican opponent Steve Chabot has voted multiple times to gut protections for people with pre-existing conditions, and I'm sick of his cruel and callous votes against my child.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Bloomberg=202020?=
subject: Mike's "All-In Economy" Agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
Let's make opportunity attainable for every American. | |
---
| | | [ ](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=83797c459d&e=f54746ec54)
---
| | | Friend, President Trump likes to tout the stock market as proof of a booming economy. But this ignores the fact that nearly half of Americans don't own stocks and that wages and opportunity are stagnant across much of the country. In fact, most of the communities that helped elect Trump are precisely the ones that have been shortchanged by his economic agenda. As an entrepreneur and as a mayor, Mike Bloomberg understands what it takes to deliver real change and create more good jobs with good salaries all across America. That goal is at the heart of the "All-In Economy" agenda that Mike announced today on Chicago's South Side. It aims to reverse the damage done during the first three years of the Trump administration by putting more Americans to work in better paying, higher quality jobs and re-energizing communities throughout the nation. **This is huge news and is exactly what Americans need to see right now.** [**We need your help spreading the word: Retweet our team's message about Mike's "All-In Economy" agenda right now.**](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=032b4c1ff5&e=f54746ec54)
---
| [ ](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=b49799c0e1&e=f54746ec54)
---
| Mike knows that hard-working Americans are seeing their prospects of success undermined by a broken system. He is calling for a transformation of the government's approach to spreading prosperity across the country with bold strategies for creating new jobs, training Americans to do those jobs, and helping connect them to those jobs. [The plan](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=a0ba11eda4&e=f54746ec54) calls for raising the minimum wage to $15 per hour, investing in the existing economic strengths of communities across the country, and a major expansion of apprenticeship programs. It outlines initiatives to improve infrastructure in rural communities and leverage community colleges and other educational institutions while emphasizing and protecting the quality and dignity of work. This is a plan Americans need to know about, because this is what this election should be focused on -- **creating real opportunities for families to thrive and succeed, no matter where they are.** [**Retweet Team Bloomberg's news about Mike's "All-In Economy" agenda right now to show your support!**](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=ba22a2645a&e=f54746ec54) Thanks, Team Bloomberg 2020
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=d4aa9b0fc1&e=f54746ec54)
---
| | [](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=7687c87239&e=f54746ec54)

909 Third Ave, New York, NY 10022

| Team - we're going to cut to the chase: [We need you to make your first donation to our New Hampshire Investment Strategy fund.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba81d/134673f2/8dda834/69976407/1344335482/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_010820_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[We have just seven days to raise the last $265,471 of our $700,000 goal.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba81d/134673f2/8dda834/69976407/1344335482/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_010820_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

If we don't hit this goal, we won't be able to keep our ads on air, knock doors, or reach the 67% of New Hampshire Democratic voters who remain undecided.

[Team, our path to victory runs through New Hampshire, where only one-third of Democratic voters say they've made up their minds.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba81d/134673f2/8dda834/69976407/1344335482/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_010820_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

As other candidates have left the race or stumbled in the last few weeks, we have doubled down and gained momentum.

Our team has put together an aggressive plan to reach the 67% of undecided voters there through paid media -- including digital advertising, direct mail, and TV -- as well as expanding our organizing and outreach programs.

Core to this strategy are our 50 New Hampshire town halls (with 31 complete already!) and a new ad series to introduce our campaign to the many voters who are just tuning in to this race.

_But team, this is going to be expensive, and we can 't rely on a billionaire's bank account._

[We have one more week to reach our goal - can you help fuel this people-powered campaign?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba81d/134673f2/8dda834/69976407/1344335482/VEsHBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_010820_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Thanks,

Team Bennet

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Joe's message on the Middle East is clear:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639022f/55b66746/2d863209/80fa2bd/2843624345/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | This morning, Joe called into radio stations across Massachusetts in the wake of the missile strikes on American and Iraqi bases last night. His message was clear: **It's not enough to just limit the President's actions in Iran - though we must do that. Congress has to go further and immediately repeal the current authorizations for use of military force in the Middle East. No president, let alone the current one, should unilaterally decide when to go to war.** Congress has abdicated its Constitutional authority and allowed presidents to engage in ever-expanding conflicts in the Middle East since the early 2000s. _No more._ [**No more unauthorized wars - Demand Congress repeal the authorizations for use of military force in the Middle East so _no_ president can sidestep the American people to go to war:**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639022f/55b66746/2d863209/80fa2be/2843624345/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/no-more-unauthorized-wars-2/e/") [NO MORE UNAUTHORIZED WARS | SIGN NOW](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639022f/55b66746/2d863209/80fa2be/2843624345/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/no-more-unauthorized-wars-2/e/") If the president wants to put more American lives on the line, if they believe there is justification for ANY military engagement overseas, then they must get authorization from the elected representatives of the American people. They must come to Congress and make their case. And Congress must be brave enough to take a vote. This country doesn't go to war without its people's consent. End of story. _Team Kennedy_ [NO MORE UNAUTHORIZED WARS | SIGN NOW](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639022f/55b66746/2d863209/80fa2be/2843624345/VEsC/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/no-more-unauthorized-wars-2/e/") |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts.
---|---

PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137.

name: Doyle Canning for Congress
subject: [The Oregonizer] 2020 is here
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CANNING FOR CONGRESS ](https://u1584542
body:
| |
---
|
---
|
---
Welcome to "The Oregonizer" _In 2020, we are titling our weekly news roundup,_ _so watch for it on __Wednesdays!_ 2020 is here! As you know, the stakes in this election year couldn't be higher. We have 104 days until **April 21,** the last day to register voters for the May 19 primary. Let's get out there and bring people into the process, into the party, and into the fight! The most effective way to do it is on the doors. Our next Eugene canvas Thanks for your support and Happy New Year everyone!
---
---
Our first neighborhood canvas was a huge success! Volunteers knocked on doors in South Eugene, spreading the word about Canning for Congress, registering voters, and gathering signatures. **All but two of our volunteers had never canvased before!** Everyone had a great experience, and said they'd do it again. It's fun, its effective, and its a great way to get out and win this election. **Join us for our next Canvas! Saturday January 18, meeting at HQ, 1492 West 6th in Eugene. **
---
|
---
[ **COMMIT TO CANVAS JANUARY 18** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/_QA/ni0YAA/t.2y8/b06Y8VJ9S6OAeWiXAnaHoQ/h0/EITbMdFK8sEmH288ys-2B-2Fh8ph-2FrB9A6-2BM0i5qCb2xsCyF4vmW2DL2rKN7XUdqiRy20tYlscGDmI6-2BYXemRjxHCvcnXlwYXqcVm2CfwzdtBwKgPqUgFG58MW5iW9-2Fqjk6ZLCdWyGQvq6Zmz1P6nFgZl3KD-2FMK6FckX2K1iBvAt-2FX5vVG8Ifp5Ewos9-2BQLfUCD6R-2BmtpwZ31jbgoWyqddvfmB1E-2Bqma2WJYzf5hX-2FX9gVvUbhADCoc11dp7oaWlTGUZkcwD7nj-2B2s02CwitGGvoEO7MHUiDS-2BxPR2gGkzlS63Rh4xvBgIzloaL1uO6oQVdCzhn6l5FerFLTlkRfRbcCfg-3D-3D/l3Wi)
---
|
---
**IN THE NEWS**
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/_QA/ni0YAA/t.2y8/b06Y8VJ9S6OAeWiXAnaHoQ/h1/y3xfVolwqEiRyzeNxz2kawonMt6Pl6UQF1-2FEbUdG-2BhNDYvZFnIEgXbb3DjVuupwaoN5N-2BeZna8B0ZspE-2BenpnPS-2FhkH0VahPoWwPxvYh5bFMX0N-2BNvObQCB1LjfR4MxMieYk1aZmnvfbvE-2BAQoP4-2BCVIrxPTjd7FoyON-2BM7ByptxGhH7bI8jOaECPDlhv-2FjaF7TA5tcvjJMi-2Faa0aO2Hgmd-2FLvL-2FYZXHV64ZXJE9G8WyD3luJZS1OphgWF9MKJa5H6BOklqB9m0V3NhVddq8syHTHrCTONEvrvOUGR2RTyb4T2o6q2z5kZirwU-2BeL0Y4qxzDTC3ryMnYA5vT3dzckg-3D-3D/1N8o)
---
**Doyle sits down with Springfield's Own Spent the Rent Podcast ** Special thanks to Patrick at [Spent the Rent Podcast](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/_QA/ni0YAA/t.2y8/b06Y8VJ9S6OAeWiXAnaHoQ/h2/y3xfVolwqEiRyzeNxz2kawonMt6Pl6UQF1-2FEbUdG-2BhNDYvZFnIEgXbb3DjVuupwaoN5N-2BeZna8B0ZspE-2BenpnPS-2FhkH0VahPoWwPxvYh5bGecmbgPhVBwGMXLyPhtBkJnjGNXX6gF4wfz9z0kCvKj19ozKfF-2FkyJfohcCUnvJIICKcCJdfXIiXcLIOfw8Phxzd-2B4PZaj-2BRx-2FZjAfZ9Zo7rU3D25mkVdORqo7eownQFsKtilKDBU5MDNJMFk8T-2FCrvJ9cwsMjEOceI-2FadVL8W48NCnDb5kofTKTXYKVbPFDy6iH-2Bdz79TQIQrf5Zub9I7trmYFxHzJBXVaC-2FhP3AX2Q-3D-3D/-EIH) for a wide ranging conversation covering everything from the climate crisis, homelessness and war with Iran -- to Doyle's love of Oregon, her two kids, and the power of stories. Tune in wherever you get your podcasts, and share!
---
|
---
**#PursuePeace #NoWarWithIran**
---
Thanks to 150 people who came out with less than a day's notice to protest possible war with Iran! After reaching out to several peace organizations in Eugene, it was clear that no one was organizing an emergency rally on Saturday as part of the national mobilization to stop this war called by a broad coalition of dozens of groups like Code Pink. It was uplifting to see so many peaceloving people come out in the cold and stand together to condemn Trump's reckless, criminal, dangerous escalations in the Middle East. Our campaign will continue to speak out and support grassroots protest to end the forever wars, and stop any new wars!
---
|
---
Supporter Steve Kiernan of Common Defense, speaks out against war: "Its been 13 years since I got my legs blown off in Iraq...It seems the only thing we have to hand down to our children is more war. I don't know about you, but I don't want to live in a country like that. I don't want to live in a world like that."
---
|
---
Doyle spoke about the impact of the "forever wars" in Iraq and Afghanistan on her generation, and called for an immediate end escalations towards war in Iran. She continued: "And we must do more than just stop war with Iran. We must firmly commit to ending U.S. military presence in the Middle East in an orderly manner. We must end our involvement in the Saudi-led intervention in Yemen. We must bring our troops home from Afghanistan. This is what I have spent my entire adult life fighting for, and I'm not stopping now."
---
|
---
Rajeev Ravisankar, VP for external relations of the Graduate Teaching Fellows Federation (GTFF), says "As working class people...we have more in common with the people of Iran than with the billionaires profiting from war."
---
**#StopJordanCove**
---
|
---
South coast residents united against the Jordan Cove fracked gas pipeline and LNG export terminal in Coos Bay gathered last night to voice opposition to the dredging permits requested by fossil fuel company Pembina. It was an overflow crowd with many supporters huddled outside listening to a livestream of the proceedings. In a tragically predictable outcome, the Coos Bay City Council voted to approve the permit 4 to 3, with Mayor Joe Benetti casting the tie breaking vote. (Benetti has long been a booster for Jordan Cove and has worked closely with Pembina to push the project forward, despite dogged opposition from the community.)
---
|
---
While local fisherman and others rallied in the cold against the blasting of the bedrock in the bay, and the permanent destruction of vital eel grass habitats that sustain local fisheries, and youth pled for a livable future....
---
|
---
Jordan Cove cynically bussed in about 150 "supporters" from labor unions, LiUna, LIWU, and UFCW local 555, along with their team of lawyers. It was heartbreaking to see the divide and conquer astroturfing tactics on display.
---
|
---
Doyle spoke with KMTR about her strong opposition to Jordan Cove and her vision for a Green New Deal to bring good jobs to the South Coast in renewable wind and wave energy -- not the dead end of fossil fuels. We need that vision today more than ever.
---
---
|
---
